personal.name: Akshay Vasoya
personal.bio: Based in Surat, India, I'm a Software Engineer and Open Source Contributor. I love building websites, plugins, themes, and scalable digital solutions. I'm passionate about Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and turning ideas into impactful products.
personal.label: CEO Anonindo

about: Information Technology graduate and aspiring AI & ML professional with hands-on experience in software engineering, WordPress plugin and theme development, and Shopify-based solutions. I have published 9 WordPress plugins and 3 themes on WordPress.org while building scalable web applications, e-commerce solutions, and computer vision-based projects for real-world use cases.

My passion for continuous learning and innovation drives me to explore emerging technologies in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Generative AI. I actively contribute to open-source projects, experiment with modern development tools, and continuously expand my knowledge through certifications, research, and hands-on development.

I bring a combination of technical expertise, problem-solving abilities, and a strong commitment to building user-focused digital solutions. Whether developing web products, AI-powered applications, or open-source software, I enjoy transforming ideas into reliable and impactful technology.

journey.description:
Provided detailed solutions and explanations for Computer Science and Information Technology questions.
Assisted students in understanding programming concepts, algorithms, databases, and software engineering topics.
Maintained high answer quality standards while meeting strict response deadlines.
Developed strong analytical, problem-solving, and technical communication skills through academic mentoring.
Supported learners from diverse educational backgrounds in improving their understanding of technical subjects.

Developed cross-platform mobile applications using Flutter and Android technologies.
Implemented user-friendly interfaces, application logic, and API integrations.
Worked with Firebase, local storage, and third-party services to enhance application functionality.
Resolved bugs, improved performance, and ensured application stability across devices.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality mobile solutions.

Develop and maintain websites and e-commerce solutions using WordPress, Shopify, Webflow, and Squarespace.
Design and build custom WordPress plugins, themes, and website features to meet business requirements.
Customize website layouts, functionality, and integrations while ensuring responsive and user-friendly experiences.
Implement API integrations, payment solutions, and automation workflows to improve operational efficiency.
Optimize website performance, security, SEO readiness, and overall user experience across multiple platforms.
Work closely with clients to transform business requirements into scalable and reliable digital solutions.

projects.name: AI CRM
projects.tagline: AI-powered attendance management system using Computer Vision and Machine Learning for real-time face recognition and automated attendance tracking.

projects.name: Heatmap Analytics
projects.tagline: WordPress analytics plugin that tracks user interactions and generates heatmaps to help website owners understand visitor behavior.
